title: acaena poterioides
intro: Acaena poterioides, also known as Biddy Down or New Zealand Broom, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant is a type of flowering ground cover that is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Acaena poterioides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy. Acaena poterioides is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in traditional Maori medicine to treat a range of ailments.
